nasb.text: He also made ten tables and placed them in the temple, five on the right side and five on the left. And he made one hundred golden bowls.

esv.text: He also made ten tables and placed them in the temple, five on the south side and five on the north. And he made a hundred basins of gold.

cnv.text: 又做了十張桌子，安放在殿內；五張在右邊，五張在左邊。又做了一百個金碗。

ccb.text: 又造了十张桌子放在殿里，五个在右边，五个在左边；还造了一百个金碗。
